description: Dual roster-extension across Aetherdrift's two corpus-active faction nodes. Five cards (2 Endriders + 3 Aether Rangers) each get a brief Connections bullet pointing back to their faction node. The frontmatter `characters:` field was already wired by earlier waves, and both node files' appears_on lists already include the cards — the missing piece was the Connections-bullet layer of the relation. Now uniform on both sides. **Skycrash (DFT-146) was investigated and REJECTED as an Endrider edge** — its flavor (*'Under moonfall conditions...'*) places the depicted wreck on the Muraganda Grand Prix leg (Stage 3) per MTG Wiki's Muraganda page, where polished moonfall is currency and lunar debris is racing hazard; no flavor or art attribution to Endriders. Neutral race-event card, leave un-faction-wired.
citations: [MTG Wiki: List of secondary characters / Avishkar — Garima]
